entry.title: Tour d’Italie 2020 - Peter Sagan : ‘You cannot have everything in life’

link.title: Tour d’Italie 2020 - Peter Sagan : ‘You cannot have everything in life’

entry.content:
Peter Sagan va participer au Tour d’Italie cette année. Une course qu’il va découvrir, mais pour ça, il doit faire l’impasse sur les Classiques flandriennes qu’il aime tant.
Crédits vidéo : @RCSSport @GirodItalia

entry.title: Hardik Pandya and Natasa Stankovic shared photo with their son वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Hardik Pandya and Natasa Stankovic shared photo with their son वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Natasha Stankovic, wife of Indian cricket team player Hardik Pandya, has given birth to a son. On arrival of young guest in Hardik’s family, lakhs of his fans have congratulated him on social media. A picture of Natasha and Hardik came on social media before delivery, in which both shared their photo while going for delivery.
टीम इंडिया के स्टार ऑल-राउंडर हार्दिक पांड्या 30 जुलाई को पिता बने। उनकी पत्नी और सर्बियाई मॉडल नताशा स्टेनकोविक ने 30 जुलाई को बेटे को जन्म दिया। हार्दिक और नताशा की बेटे के साथ पहली फोटो सोशल मीडिया पर शेयर की गई है। नताशा ने यह फोटो शेयर की और हार्दिक पांड्या के लिए एक खास मैसेज भी लिखा। हार्दिक पांड्या और नताशा ने इस साल के शुरुआत में सगाई की थी और लॉकडाउन के दौरान शादी की थी।
#HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #BabyBoy
entry.summary: Natasha Stankovic, wife of Indian cricket team player Hardik Pandya, has given birth to a son. On arrival of young guest in Hardik’s family, lakhs of his fans have congratulated him on social media. A picture of Natasha and Hardik came on social media before delivery, in which both shared their photo while going for delivery. टीम इंडिया के स्टार ऑल-राउंडर हार्दिक पांड्या 30 जुलाई को पिता बने। उनकी पत्नी और सर्बियाई मॉडल नताशा स्टेनकोविक ने 30 जुलाई को बेटे को जन्म दिया। हार्दिक और नताशा की बेटे के साथ पहली फोटो सोशल मीडिया पर शेयर की गई है। नताशा ने यह फोटो शेयर की और हार्दिक पांड्या के लिए एक खास मैसेज भी लिखा। हार्दिक पांड्या और नताशा ने इस साल के शुरुआत में सगाई की थी और लॉकडाउन के दौरान शादी की थी। #HardikPandya #NatashaStankovic #BabyBoy

entry.title: Gisèle Halimi : disparition d’une grande avocate pour la cause des femmes

link.title: Gisèle Halimi : disparition d’une grande avocate pour la cause des femmes

entry.content:
La disparition d’une grande combattante. Gisèle Halimi est décédée mardi 28 juillet, au lendemain de son 93ème anniversaire. Avocate, femme politique et écrivaine, elle avait consacré sa vie à la défense du droit des femmes.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La disparition d’une grande combattante. Gisèle Halimi est décédée mardi 28 juillet, au lendemain de son 93ème anniversaire. Avocate, femme politique et écrivaine, elle avait consacré sa vie à la défense du droit des femmes. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: UnFramed: Season 1 Episode 2 - Life Behind the Hakka-Chinese Canadian Artist, Ness Lee (Full) Fuse

link.title: UnFramed: Season 1 Episode 2 - Life Behind the Hakka-Chinese Canadian Artist, Ness Lee (Full) Fuse

entry.content: Ness Lee is a Hakka-Chinese Canadian illustrator challenging the perception of Asian beauty, sexuality, nudity and power. Recognized for her style and subject matter, Lee has been selected as a top illustrator by American Illustration, Society of Illustrators and CMYK magazine.
entry.summary: Ness Lee is a Hakka-Chinese Canadian illustrator challenging the perception of Asian beauty, sexuality, nudity and power. Recognized for her style and subject matter, Lee has been selected as a top illustrator by American Illustration, Society of Illustrators and CMYK magazine.

entry.title: Common Mistakes Baking Cookies

link.title: Common Mistakes Baking Cookies

entry.content:
Making cookies isn’t always easy.
Business Insider spoke to bakers and compiled a list of common mistakes people make when baking cookies.
By not chilling the dough could be messing with the texture of your cookies.
Overcrowding the pan can lead to some wonky cookies.
Avoid overmixing or undermixing the dough.
Using stale baking powder or soda might make cookies fall flat.
Don’t forget to adjust baking time if using dark colored baking sheets.
Opening the oven door too many times will make it harder for cookies to bake.
entry.summary: Making cookies isn’t always easy. Business Insider spoke to bakers and compiled a list of common mistakes people make when baking cookies. By not chilling the dough could be messing with the texture of your cookies. Overcrowding the pan can lead to some wonky cookies. Avoid overmixing or undermixing the dough. Using stale baking powder or soda might make cookies fall flat. Don’t forget to adjust baking time if using dark colored baking sheets. Opening the oven door too many times will make it harder for cookies to bake.

entry.title: IPL 2020 : Know where Mumbai Indians, KKR, SRH Teams are planning to Stay in UAE Oneindia Sports

link.title: IPL 2020 : Know where Mumbai Indians, KKR, SRH Teams are planning to Stay in UAE Oneindia Sports

entry.content:
Firstly, almost every franchise management InsideSport spoke to admitted that they are exploring to block Chartered flights for the team travel to UAE and no regular flights will be used for the purpose. Secondly, franchises will not book five-star hotels for the squad in UAE, instead they are planning to book resorts and private apartments for the players in order to ensure complete safety for the squad from the Coronavirus. Shah Rukh Khan owned Kolkata Knight Riders could camp in Abu Dhabi instead of Dubai, again to keep their players safe during the pandemic
आईपीएल 2020 से जुड़ी एक बड़ी खबर निकलकर सामने आ रही है. कहा जा रहा है कि आईपीएल की टीमें किराए के घर में ठहर सकती है. खबर आ रही है कि फ्रेंचाइजी खिलाड़ी और सपोर्ट स्‍टाफ के लिए फाइव स्टार होटल की बजाय रिसॉर्ट और किराये का पूरा अपार्टमेंट लेने पर विचार कर रही है. टाइम्‍स ऑफ इंडिया की खबर के अनुसार सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद पहले से ही गोल्‍फ रिसॉर्ट के संपर्क में है. वहीं मुंबई इंडियंस और कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स अबु धाबी में अपना कैंप लगा सकती है. यहां तक कि मुंबई इंडियंस किराये का अपार्टमेंट लेने पर विचार कर रही है.
#IPL2020 #MSDhoni #CSK
entry.summary: Firstly, almost every franchise management InsideSport spoke to admitted that they are exploring to block Chartered flights for the team travel to UAE and no regular flights will be used for the purpose. Secondly, franchises will not book five-star hotels for the squad in UAE, instead they are planning to book resorts and private apartments for the players in order to ensure complete safety for the squad from the Coronavirus. Shah Rukh Khan owned Kolkata Knight Riders could camp in Abu Dhabi instead of Dubai, again to keep their players safe during the pandemic आईपीएल 2020 से जुड़ी एक बड़ी खबर निकलकर सामने आ रही है. कहा जा रहा है कि आईपीएल की टीमें किराए के घर में ठहर सकती है. खबर आ रही है कि फ्रेंचाइजी खिलाड़ी और सपोर्ट स्‍टाफ के लिए फाइव स्टार होटल की बजाय रिसॉर्ट और किराये का पूरा अपार्टमेंट लेने पर विचार कर रही है. टाइम्‍स ऑफ इंडिया की खबर के अनुसार सनराइजर्स हैदराबाद पहले से ही गोल्‍फ रिसॉर्ट के संपर्क में है. वहीं मुंबई इंडियंस और कोलकाता नाइट राइडर्स अबु धाबी में अपना कैंप लगा सकती है. यहां तक कि मुंबई इंडियंस किराये का अपार्टमेंट लेने पर विचार कर रही है. #IPL2020 #MSDhoni #CSK

entry.title: Manipur CM inaugurates 300-bed COVID care centre

link.title: Manipur CM inaugurates 300-bed COVID care centre

entry.content: Manipur Chief Minister Biren Singh inaugurated a 300-bedded COVID care centre at Manipur Trade and Expo Centre in Lamboikhongnangkhong on August 03. The facility can be further upgraded to a 1000 bedded if need arises. A total of 1,087 active cases have been reported in the state so far.
entry.summary: Manipur Chief Minister Biren Singh inaugurated a 300-bedded COVID care centre at Manipur Trade and Expo Centre in Lamboikhongnangkhong on August 03. The facility can be further upgraded to a 1000 bedded if need arises. A total of 1,087 active cases have been reported in the state so far.

entry.title: DGSE : deux agents mis en examen pour tentative de meurtre

link.title: DGSE : deux agents mis en examen pour tentative de meurtre

entry.content:
En France, deux agents de la DGSE ont été mis en examen pour un projet de meurtre. Les suspects sont deux militaires des renseignements extérieurs. Clément Weill-Raynal, du service police-justice de France Télévisions était sur le plateau du 23h pour décrypter l’affaire.  
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: En France, deux agents de la DGSE ont été mis en examen pour un projet de meurtre. Les suspects sont deux militaires des renseignements extérieurs. Clément Weill-Raynal, du service police-justice de France Télévisions était sur le plateau du 23h pour décrypter l’affaire. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Miles de botellas plásticas con etiquetas chinas llegan a Galápagos

link.title: Miles de botellas plásticas con etiquetas chinas llegan a Galápagos

entry.content: Indignación en la población de Galápagos, miles de botellas plásticas chinas llegan a las playas de las islas provenientes de los buques chino que depredan la fauna marina del archipiélago
entry.summary: Indignación en la población de Galápagos, miles de botellas plásticas chinas llegan a las playas de las islas provenientes de los buques chino que depredan la fauna marina del archipiélago

entry.title: Comment reconnaître une aide malveillante ?_IN

link.title: Comment reconnaître une aide malveillante ?_IN

entry.content: Il est vrai que lorsqu’on tient à une personne, on est prêt à tout pour la protéger, la consoler quand les choses vont mal ou l’aider quand elle en a le plus besoin. Toutefois, il arrive que cette aide soit accompagnée d’un blâme ou d’un regard moralisateur. Parce qu’on ne comprend pas comment l’autre a pu en arriver là, qu’il est difficile de cautionner son comportement ou que le moment n’est simplement pas adapté, cette aide devient toxique et perd toute son utilité.
entry.summary: Il est vrai que lorsqu’on tient à une personne, on est prêt à tout pour la protéger, la consoler quand les choses vont mal ou l’aider quand elle en a le plus besoin. Toutefois, il arrive que cette aide soit accompagnée d’un blâme ou d’un regard moralisateur. Parce qu’on ne comprend pas comment l’autre a pu en arriver là, qu’il est difficile de cautionner son comportement ou que le moment n’est simplement pas adapté, cette aide devient toxique et perd toute son utilité.

entry.title: Masques obligatoires en extérieur : une réponse au ‘doublement du nombres de cas’ à Lille

link.title: Masques obligatoires en extérieur : une réponse au ‘doublement du nombres de cas’ à Lille

entry.content:
Le masque va devenir obligatoire à Lille dans les espaces publics extérieurs dès lundi. Étienne Champion, directeur de l’Agence régionale de Santé des Hauts-de-France, explique pourquoi cette mesure était nécessaire, en complément d’autres actions de prévention.
Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :
entry.summary: Le masque va devenir obligatoire à Lille dans les espaces publics extérieurs dès lundi. Étienne Champion, directeur de l’Agence régionale de Santé des Hauts-de-France, explique pourquoi cette mesure était nécessaire, en complément d’autres actions de prévention. Retrouvez "La matinale d’Europe 1 - Le 6h - 9h" sur :

entry.title: Ilaiyaraja பிரசாத் ஸ்டுடியோ மீது போலீஸ்ல் புகார்

link.title: Ilaiyaraja பிரசாத் ஸ்டுடியோ மீது போலீஸ்ல் புகார்

entry.content:
#Ilaiyaraja
#PrasadStudio
பிரசாத் ஸ்டுடியோ நிர்வாகி சாய் பிரசாத் மீது இசையமைப்பாளர் இளையராஜா புகார் அளித்துள்ளார்.
entry.summary: #Ilaiyaraja #PrasadStudio பிரசாத் ஸ்டுடியோ நிர்வாகி சாய் பிரசாத் மீது இசையமைப்பாளர் இளையராஜா புகார் அளித்துள்ளார்.

entry.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s Last Chat With His Sister On June 10

link.title: Sushant Singh Rajput’s Last Chat With His Sister On June 10

entry.content: Sushant Singh Rajput’s sister Shweta has shared the screenshot of last chat with the late actor. In the chats, Sushant’s sister who lives in the US can be seen asking him to visit her to the US. To this, Sushant had replied, ‘Bahut mann karta hai di.’ His sister then insisted him to come for a month. She wrote to him, “To aa jao na baby…come here for a month. Just chill here…Acha lagega tumhe…I won’t tell my friends that you are here…so koi botheration and milna jhulna bhi nhi hoga….we can just have a good time. Go for nice walks and hikes and long drives.” This conversation of the brother-sister duo happened on June 10 and 4 days later, on June 14, Sushant was found dead in his apartment. Sushant’s sister wrote in the caption, “Both of us got too busy with our lives. Bhai got into Bollywood and kept making us all proud with his accomplishments but I remained protective about him. I would often ask him to come and visit me in the US so that we can relive our childhood once again away from all the noise. I only wish I could have protected him from everything….I still wish I will wake up to see my Bhai… just right next to me and will realize this whole episode was just a nightmare and nothing more.” Seeing Sushant’s last message to his sister is heartbreaking and makes us think about the what ifs! What if he had considered going to US to stay with his sister! Meanwhile, Mumbai Police is currently investigating his case.
entry.summary: Sushant Singh Rajput’s sister Shweta has shared the screenshot of last chat with the late actor. In the chats, Sushant’s sister who lives in the US can be seen asking him to visit her to the US. To this, Sushant had replied, ‘Bahut mann karta hai di.’ His sister then insisted him to come for a month. She wrote to him, “To aa jao na baby…come here for a month. Just chill here…Acha lagega tumhe…I won’t tell my friends that you are here…so koi botheration and milna jhulna bhi nhi hoga….we can just have a good time. Go for nice walks and hikes and long drives.” This conversation of the brother-sister duo happened on June 10 and 4 days later, on June 14, Sushant was found dead in his apartment. Sushant’s sister wrote in the caption, “Both of us got too busy with our lives. Bhai got into Bollywood and kept making us all proud with his accomplishments but I remained protective about him. I would often ask him to come and visit me in the US so that we can relive our childhood once again away from all the noise. I only wish I could have protected him from everything….I still wish I will wake up to see my Bhai… just right next to me and will realize this whole episode was just a nightmare and nothing more.” Seeing Sushant’s last message to his sister is heartbreaking and makes us think about the what ifs! What if he had considered going to US to stay with his sister! Meanwhile, Mumbai Police is currently investigating his case.

entry.title: Dirilis Ertrugul season 5 episode 11 in hd with urdu subtitles

link.title: Dirilis Ertrugul season 5 episode 11 in hd with urdu subtitles

entry.content:
Dirilis Ertrugul season 5 episode 11 in hd with urdu subtitles
The hit TV show from TRT, Ertugrul Ghazi, is now available in Urdu brought to you by TRT and PTV.
‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries.
Watch NEW episode every Friday, Saturday and Sunday.
Tune in to PTV’s flagship entertainment channel PTV Home at 7.55 pm every Friday, Saturday and Sunday to be the first to watch.
Diriliş: Ertuğrul (transl. "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire.
Season 5
The fifth season takes place 10 years after the Battle of Kose Dag, where the Mongols took over the Seljuk state. The arrival of the new tax collectors, the Umurogullari, disrupts the balance of Sogut. Umur Bey’s daughter, Ilbilge Hatun, infiltrates the Kayi tribe to gain information on Ertugrul, and falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Commander Dragos, a disgraced Byzantine warrior seeks to conquer Sogut. He kills Umur Bey and frames Gunduz Alp, pitting two tribes against each other.
Emir Bahattin’s presence serves to disrupt Ertugrul’s plans against the Mongols. Following Gunduz’s acquittal after the truth about Dragos is revealed, Beybolat Bey arrives. As the son of Umur Bey and Bey of the Umuroğlu after his father’s death he is a Seljuk assassin that works with the Mongols to wipe out rebelling Oğuz Tribes, under a fake name Albaşti. Ertugrul’s brothers are on the run from Albasti and hide in the mountains. Beybolat seeks to marry Ilbilge with Bahattin, but his plans are ruined when Ertugrul asks her for marriage, and she accepts.
Ertugrul raids the Mongols and steals the tax gold in order to start a huge war. This leads to Emir Bahattin’s death with Albasti and Dragos still at large. Ertugrul survives an assassination attempt when Zangoc (the real Dragos) saves him from the assassin’s arrows. Ertugrul now suspects Zangoc of being Dragos and tasks Mergen to track him. Hulagu Han sends Commander Alincak and Subutay to raid the Kayi tribe. They capture the family.
entry.summary: Dirilis Ertrugul season 5 episode 11 in hd with urdu subtitles The hit TV show from TRT, Ertugrul Ghazi, is now available in Urdu brought to you by TRT and PTV. ‘Ertugrul Ghazi’ is an epic story rooted in the historical events of Anatolia (modern-day Turkey). It is the tale of a daring character with enthralling love and a sense of justice that was strong enough to change the fate of the World. The nomadic Kayi tribe of the Oghuz Turks are on a quest to find a place they can finally call home. Ertugrul leads his people through perseverance against hardship while striving for justice and maintaining the traditions of the land. By battling his enemies with strength and bravery, Ertugrul consequently plants the seed that would lead to the founding of the Ottoman Empire, which spread across three continents and ruled for six centuries. Watch NEW episode every Friday, Saturday and Sunday. Tune in to PTV’s flagship entertainment channel PTV Home at 7.55 pm every Friday, Saturday and Sunday to be the first to watch. Diriliş: Ertuğrul (transl. "Resurrection: Ertuğrul") is a Turkish historical fiction[2] and adventure television series created by Mehmet Bozdağ, starring Engin Altan Düzyatan in the title role. It was filmed in Riva, a village in the Beykoz district of Istanbul, Turkey, and premiered on TRT 1 in Turkey on December 10, 2014. The show is set in 13th century and centers around the life of Ertuğrul, the father of Osman I, who was the founder of the Ottoman Empire. Season 5 The fifth season takes place 10 years after the Battle of Kose Dag, where the Mongols took over the Seljuk state. The arrival of the new tax collectors, the Umurogullari, disrupts the balance of Sogut. Umur Bey’s daughter, Ilbilge Hatun, infiltrates the Kayi tribe to gain information on Ertugrul, and falls in love with him. Meanwhile, Commander Dragos, a disgraced Byzantine warrior seeks to conquer Sogut. He kills Umur Bey and frames Gunduz Alp, pitting two tribes against each other. Emir Bahattin’s presence serves to disrupt Ertugrul’s plans against the Mongols. Following Gunduz’s acquittal after the truth about Dragos is revealed, Beybolat Bey arrives. As the son of Umur Bey and Bey of the Umuroğlu after his father’s death he is a Seljuk assassin that works with the Mongols to wipe out rebelling Oğuz Tribes, under a fake name Albaşti. Ertugrul’s brothers are on the run from Albasti and hide in the mountains. Beybolat seeks to marry Ilbilge with Bahattin, but his plans are ruined when Ertugrul asks her for marriage, and she accepts. Ertugrul raids the Mongols and steals the tax gold in order to start a huge war. This leads to Emir Bahattin’s death with Albasti and Dragos still at large. Ertugrul survives an assassination attempt when Zangoc (the real Dragos) saves him from the assassin’s arrows. Ertugrul now suspects Zangoc of being Dragos and tasks Mergen to track him. Hulagu Han sends Commander Alincak and Subutay to raid the Kayi tribe. They capture the family.

entry.summary: Africa Smart Citizens Smart Citizens, la startup sénégalaise qui veut mettre fin au vol de bétails avec le digital.

entry.title: MS Dhoni isn’t finished yet and might continue to play cricket says Vijay Dahiya वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: MS Dhoni isn’t finished yet and might continue to play cricket says Vijay Dahiya वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Former India wicketkeeper-batsman Vijay Dahiya has opined that MS Dhoni isn’t finished yet and might continue to play competitive cricket. Dhoni has been away from the game since July 2019, Dhoni was to make his return for Chennai Super Kings in March but the tournament had to be postponed. As for now, he is confirmed to end his exile in September.
टीम इंडिया के पूर्व कप्तान और स्टार क्रिकेटर महेंद्र सिंह धोनी एक साल से ज्यादा समय से प्रतिस्पर्धी क्रिकेट से दूर हैं। 2019 वर्ल्ड कप सेमीफाइनल के बाद धोनी ने कोई मैच नहीं खेला है। ऐसे में उनके भविष्य को लेकर तमाम तरह की चर्चाएं होती रहती हैं। तमाम दिग्गज क्रिकेटरों का मानना है कि धोनी अब इंटरनैशनल क्रिकेट में वापसी नहीं कर पाएंगे। टीम इंडिया के पूर्व विकेटकीपर बल्लेबाज विजय दहिया की राय हालांकि अलग है।
#VijayDahiya #MSDhoni #IPL2020
entry.summary: Former India wicketkeeper-batsman Vijay Dahiya has opined that MS Dhoni isn’t finished yet and might continue to play competitive cricket. Dhoni has been away from the game since July 2019, Dhoni was to make his return for Chennai Super Kings in March but the tournament had to be postponed. As for now, he is confirmed to end his exile in September. टीम इंडिया के पूर्व कप्तान और स्टार क्रिकेटर महेंद्र सिंह धोनी एक साल से ज्यादा समय से प्रतिस्पर्धी क्रिकेट से दूर हैं। 2019 वर्ल्ड कप सेमीफाइनल के बाद धोनी ने कोई मैच नहीं खेला है। ऐसे में उनके भविष्य को लेकर तमाम तरह की चर्चाएं होती रहती हैं। तमाम दिग्गज क्रिकेटरों का मानना है कि धोनी अब इंटरनैशनल क्रिकेट में वापसी नहीं कर पाएंगे। टीम इंडिया के पूर्व विकेटकीपर बल्लेबाज विजय दहिया की राय हालांकि अलग है। #VijayDahiya #MSDhoni #IPL2020

entry.title: HDゲームセンターCX #185 名騎手めざして…「ファミリージョッキー」Retro Game Master Game Center CX

link.title: HDゲームセンターCX #185 名騎手めざして…「ファミリージョッキー」Retro Game Master Game Center CX

entry.content:
第185回 - #185 名騎手めざして…「ファミリージョッキー」（2014年8月7日）
有野の挑戦…『ファミリージョッキー』
たまに行くならこんなゲームコーナー…埼玉県秩父市上町1丁目5・矢尾百貨店5階 ゲームセンター 矢尾ゲームコロニー
ファミコンボックス（福島市・橋本館）…『レッキングクルー』
ゲーム特集（GB編）…1991年4 - 5月
#185 - #185 Aiming for Great Jockeys… "Family Jockeys" (August 7, 2014)
Arino’s challenge… "Family Jockey
If you go to this kind of game corner sometimes, you can go to this kind of game corner…Game Center Yao Game Colony, Chichibu City, Chichibu City, Saitama Prefecture, 1-5, Yao Department Store, 5th floor.
Famicom Box (Hashimoto-kan, Fukushima City)… "Wrecking Crew".
Special feature on games (GB)… 1991 April - May

Famicom Box (Hashimoto-kan, Fukushima City)… "Wrecking Crew". Special feature on games (GB)… 1991 April - May

entry.title: Reprise du feu à Martigues au niveau de Jonquières

link.title: Reprise du feu à Martigues au niveau de Jonquières

entry.content:
Un gros panache de fumée est visible à Martigues. Le feu semble avoir repris au même endroit que son premier départ hier soir c’est à dire au niveau du quartier de Jonquières.  …
Vidéo publiée le : 05/08/2020 à 13:39:00
Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :
entry.summary: Un gros panache de fumée est visible à Martigues. Le feu semble avoir repris au même endroit que son premier départ hier soir c’est à dire au niveau du quartier de Jonquières. … Vidéo publiée le : 05/08/2020 à 13:39:00 Lien vers l’article de Maritima.info :
